zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Pershal是Adam Pershal和Joyce de Botetourt的女兒，於1393年出生在英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓。她於1415年9月26日與Richard Mytton在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年8月5日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德享年27歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Pershal是Adam Pershal和Joyce de Botetourt的女儿，于1393年出生在英国斯塔福爾韋斯頓。她于1415年9月26日与Richard Mytton在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年8月5日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德享年27岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Pershal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Perschall, a variant of Parschall (see Parshall ); alternatively, a variant of Perschel, from a pet form of Persch, a short form of Berthold or Peter in the border area with Czechia.

variants.name: Parshall
meanings: Americanized form of South German Parschall, a variant of Parschalk, a status name for a freeholder (a freeman with few service obligations), from Middle High German bar ‘naked’, ‘free from, apparent’ + schalk ‘servant, man’. See Pershall .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Pershal was born in 1393, in Weston, Staffordshire, England as the daughter of Adam Pershal and Joyce de Botetourt. She married Richard Mytton on 26 September 1415, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 5 August 1420, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27, and was buried in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Pershal est née en 1393, à Weston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, fille de Adam Pershal et Joyce de Botetourt. Elle a épousé Richard Mytton le 26 septembre 1415, à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 août 1420, à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Pershalは1393年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストンでAdam PershalとJoyce de Botetourtの娘として生まれた。1415年9月26日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドでRichard Myttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年8月5日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドで27歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Pershal(은)는 1393년 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴에서 Adam Pershal(와)과 Joyce de Botetourt의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1415년 9월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 Richard Mytton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 8월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Pershal родилась в 1393 г. в местности вестон, стаффордшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Adam Pershal и Joyce de Botetourt. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Mytton 26 сентября 1415 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 августа 1420 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
